merchant_greeting_1.name: Merchant
lines: What's up? Are you looking for something?

merchant_greeting_2.name: Merchant
lines: If you need something, spit it out. Otherwise stop wasting my time.

merchant_greeting_2.name: Annoyed Merchant
lines: You are starting to annoy me.

merchant_greeting_3.name: Freaky Merchant
lines: Do you also like to hit the gritty while gooning to Sabubu Lex and Amogus?
